digest.component_or_area: plan-review and code-review convergence floor gates
propositions: Flip remediation_mode and novelty_drop_active config defaults from False to True to activate the previously inert cross-round convergence floors by default.
Field evidence (verdict instability on byte-identical plans, remediation edits minting new findings, compute consumed by 4+ review round tail) justifies enabling the floors.
novelty_drop_active is a shared gate consumed by both plan-review rising floor and the code-review region-gated floor, so flipping it deliberately activates the code-review floor too.
A rule-based grep sweep must update all doc, comment, and test-name references claiming the flags/floors are default-OFF or inert to default-ON framing naming explicit false as back-out.
Tests must prove default-ON activates each floor gate while explicit-False restores the byte-identical full-review off-path.
Non-goals: completion_floor_active stays False and threshold/priority/window values and floor math remain unchanged.
